title: DeckPack
description: Simple essentials mods for playing on the steam deck. Consists of some performance enhancements, minor tweaks, controller support, and journeymap.
body:
# Basics for playing on the Steam Deck
A simple pack of performance enhancements, sound enhancements, controller support, and JourneyMap.





I'd love to hear feedback or possible improvements to the pack, hit me up on discord: Boreal#2845
If this pack gains some steam ;) then ill setup some proper github and discord junk.
